title: Fix unclear activation/license error messages
problem: Users who hit license or activation failures may not know what to do next.
why_it_matters: Activation blockers stop paid usage and create refund risk.
action: Inventory every activation failure state and rewrite each message with cause, fix, and support path.
validation_test: Trigger invalid key, expired key, offline activation, and server failure states and confirm each gives a clear next step.

title: Improve first successful dictation flow
problem: New users may not reach the first successful dictation fast enough.
why_it_matters: First successful dictation is the activation event that proves Vocalype works.
action: Remove one avoidable step between first launch and dictating text into another app.
validation_test: Fresh install user completes first successful dictation and paste in under 3 minutes.

title: Add onboarding checklist
problem: New users can lose track of permissions, model setup, and first dictation steps.
why_it_matters: A short checklist reduces first-session confusion and support burden.
action: Add a checklist for permissions, model readiness, test dictation, and paste verification.
validation_test: Five new users follow the checklist without founder guidance.

title: Add offline by default trust indicator
problem: The app may not visibly reinforce that dictation is private and local.
why_it_matters: Trust is a core differentiator against cloud transcription products.
area: app shell, dictation status, privacy messaging
action: Show a concise local/offline status near the dictation control or model status.
validation_test: In a 5-second test, users can identify whether voice leaves the device.

title: Add model recommendation presets
problem: Model selection can feel technical for non-expert users.
why_it_matters: Preset modes reduce setup friction and help users choose the right speed/accuracy tradeoff.
action: Create presets for fastest, best accuracy, French, developer, low-end PC, and privacy mode.
validation_test: New user selects a preset without reading model documentation.

title: Improve permission instructions
problem: Permission setup can block dictation across apps if users do not understand why it is required.
why_it_matters: Permission failure prevents the product promise from working everywhere.
action: Rewrite permission screens to explain what to grant, why it matters, and how to fix denial.
validation_test: Deny and re-enable permissions on a clean machine and confirm the recovery path is clear.

title: Benchmark French dictation
problem: French dictation quality is not tracked with repeatable cases.
why_it_matters: French users need accuracy proof before trusting dictation for daily work.
action: Create and run 25 French casual and professional dictation samples across supported models.
validation_test: Compare WER estimate, latency, and punctuation quality for each model.

title: Benchmark developer/code dictation
problem: Developer dictation may fail on identifiers, punctuation, and technical phrasing.
why_it_matters: Developers are a high-value niche if Vocalype works in VS Code and ChatGPT workflows.
action: Create 20 code dictation tests covering comments, function names, commands, and punctuation.
validation_test: Run each supported model and measure exact-match rate for code-sensitive tokens.

title: Compare local models on latency
problem: The fastest usable offline model is not proven with current measurements.
why_it_matters: Latency affects whether users feel Vocalype is faster than typing.
action: Measure time from stop speaking to text appearing for Whisper, Parakeet, Moonshine, and SenseVoice.
validation_test: Run 10 identical English samples per model on the same machine.

title: Compare low-end PC performance
problem: Offline dictation may be too slow or memory-heavy on low-end machines.
why_it_matters: Low-end performance affects market size and refund risk.
action: Benchmark RAM, CPU, startup time, and latency on a low-end Windows laptop profile.
validation_test: Run the standard benchmark suite with no GPU acceleration.

title: Create privacy mode preset
problem: Privacy-focused users need a clear mode that avoids cloud transcription.
why_it_matters: Privacy mode turns the local-first promise into a visible product control.
action: Define a privacy preset that only allows local models and shows offline status.
validation_test: Enable privacy mode and verify no cloud model can be selected.

title: Track download button CTR
problem: The website cannot prove whether messaging turns visitors into download intent.
why_it_matters: Download CTR is the first measurable conversion step for distribution.
action: Track download button impressions and clicks with a privacy-friendly event.
validation_test: Click the button in staging and verify the event is recorded once.

title: Track first dictation success rate
problem: The most important activation event is not visible as a daily metric.
why_it_matters: This metric tells whether product changes actually improve activation.
action: Record first successful dictation per new user session without storing dictated content.
validation_test: Complete first dictation on a clean profile and verify one activation event is recorded.

title: Track trial-to-paid conversion
problem: Revenue work cannot be prioritized without a trial-to-paid metric.
why_it_matters: Trial-to-paid conversion links activation, pricing, and checkout quality to revenue.
action: Track trial start, upgrade click, checkout start, paid activation, and refund request.
validation_test: Run a test checkout path and verify each funnel event appears in order.

title: Test pricing clarity
problem: Users may not understand what they get from the paid plan.
why_it_matters: Pricing confusion lowers upgrades and increases support questions.
action: Rewrite pricing bullets around usage outcomes, offline privacy, and cross-app dictation.
validation_test: Ask five visitors what paid plan unlocks after reading pricing for 10 seconds.

title: Add stronger hero section promise
problem: The landing page may not communicate Vocalype in under 5 seconds.
why_it_matters: Clear positioning improves download intent from all traffic sources.
action: Make the hero promise literal: Speak, text appears, paste anywhere. Offline by default.
validation_test: Run a 5-second test and measure whether users can explain the product promise.

title: Generate 50 demo-based short-form video ideas
problem: Distribution needs repeatable demos instead of generic startup posts.
why_it_matters: Short-form demos can show the product promise and drive downloads.
action: Generate at least 50 hooks that demonstrate Vocalype in real apps and workflows.
validation_test: Publish 5 ideas and compare view-to-download click rate.

title: Create developer niche content scripts
problem: Developers need proof that Vocalype works in VS Code and ChatGPT workflows.
why_it_matters: Developer content can reach a focused audience with strong productivity pain.
action: Write 10 scripts showing dictation into VS Code comments, commit messages, and ChatGPT prompts.
validation_test: Publish 3 developer videos and compare saves, comments, and download clicks.

title: Create student niche content scripts
problem: Students may not see how Vocalype helps with notes and study workflows.
why_it_matters: Students are a large audience for fast notes, essays, and ChatGPT prompts.
action: Write 10 student scripts showing lecture recap, essay brainstorming, and study notes.
validation_test: Publish 3 student videos and compare retention and download clicks.

title: Create voice instead of keyboard challenge
problem: The product needs a memorable challenge that demonstrates behavior change.
why_it_matters: A challenge format can make the value concrete and repeatable across platforms.
action: Run a 24-hour challenge replacing typing with Vocalype in emails, ChatGPT, notes, and VS Code.
validation_test: Publish challenge clips and measure comments asking for the app name.

title: Create competitor comparison content
problem: Users comparing dictation tools may not know why Vocalype is different.
why_it_matters: Comparison content captures high-intent search and social attention.
action: Create honest comparison posts around offline privacy, speed, supported workflows, and simplicity.
validation_test: Publish one comparison page and one short video, then track clicks and search impressions.

title: Map first successful dictation blockers
problem: The activation path may contain unknown permission, model, or paste friction.
why_it_matters: First successful dictation is Vocalype's most important activation event.
action: Run a clean-install activation audit and record every step before first dictation.
validation_test: New profile reaches first successful dictation in under 3 minutes.

title: Rewrite activation failure copy
problem: License or login failures can leave users stuck.
why_it_matters: Activation confusion creates refund risk and support load.
action: Add cause, fix, and support path to every activation error.
validation_test: Trigger each activation failure and confirm the next step is obvious.
